label: World object
description: Defines a world object type: settlements, caravans, sites, space platforms, and other entities that exist on the world map.

worldObjectClass.label: World object class
worldObjectClass.description: C# WorldObject subclass that implements runtime behavior for this world object type. Common values include Caravan, Site, Settlement, MapParent, SpaceMapParent.

canHaveFaction.label: Can have faction
canHaveFaction.description: If true, this world object can be owned by a faction.

saved.label: Saved
saved.description: If true, this world object is persisted to the save file. Set to false for transient objects such as route planner waypoints.

canBePlayerHome.label: Can be player home
canBePlayerHome.description: If true, the player can designate this world object as a home base.

treatAsPlayerHome.label: Treat as player home
treatAsPlayerHome.description: If true, this world object is always treated as a player home for incident targeting and storyteller logic, regardless of player designation.

canResizeToGravship.label: Can resize to gravship
canResizeToGravship.description: If true, the map generated for this world object can be resized to match the gravship footprint.

requiresSignalJammerToReach.label: Requires signal jammer to reach
requiresSignalJammerToReach.description: If true, a ship with an active signal jammer is required to approach this world object.

overrideMapSize.label: Override map size
overrideMapSize.description: Overrides the default map size for this world object. Written as '(200, 1, 200)'. Source type is IntVec3?.

comps.label: Comps
comps.description: World object comp properties list. Each entry is discriminated by the Class attribute and must extend WorldObjectCompProperties.

canHaveMap.label: Can have map
canHaveMap.description: If true, a map can be generated for this world object.

validLaunchTarget.label: Valid launch target
validLaunchTarget.description: If true, this world object can be targeted by transport pods and shuttles.

allowCaravanIncidentsWhichGenerateMap.label: Allow caravan incidents which generate map
allowCaravanIncidentsWhichGenerateMap.description: If true, incidents that generate a temporary map can occur at this world object while a caravan is present.

isTempIncidentMapOwner.label: Is temp incident map owner
isTempIncidentMapOwner.description: If true, this world object hosts temporary incident maps and is removed after the caravan leaves.

IncidentTargetTags.label: Incident target tags
IncidentTargetTags.description: Tags that mark this world object as a valid target for incidents. Each tag references an IncidentTargetTagDef.

selectable.label: Selectable
selectable.description: If true, the player can click to select this world object.

neverMultiSelect.label: Never multi-select
neverMultiSelect.description: If true, this world object is excluded from multi-selection.

mapGenerator.label: Map generator
mapGenerator.description: MapGeneratorDef used to generate the map when entering this world object.

inspectorTabs.label: Inspector tabs
inspectorTabs.description: List of WITab class names shown in the inspect pane when this world object is selected.

useDynamicDrawer.label: Use dynamic drawer
useDynamicDrawer.description: If true, this world object uses a dynamic drawer for rendering (e.g. animated caravans).

expandingIcon.label: Expanding icon
expandingIcon.description: If true, this world object shows an expanding icon in the world view.

expandingIconTexture.label: Expanding icon texture
expandingIconTexture.description: Texture path for the expanding world view icon. Relative to the RimWorld content root.

expandingIconMaskTexture.label: Expanding icon mask texture
expandingIconMaskTexture.description: Texture path for the expanding icon mask, used with cutout-complex shaders.

expandingIconPriority.label: Expanding icon priority
expandingIconPriority.description: Draw priority of the expanding icon. Higher values are drawn on top when icons overlap.

texture.label: Texture
texture.description: Texture path for the world map icon of this object. Relative to the RimWorld content root.

mapEdgeTexture.label: Map edge texture
mapEdgeTexture.description: Texture path shown at the edge of the map when this world object is adjacent.

mapEdgeShader.label: Map edge shader
mapEdgeShader.description: ShaderTypeDef used to render the map edge texture. Private field in source; include here as it may be read by the XML loader via reflection.

expandMore.label: Expand more
expandMore.description: If true, the expanding icon grows further when moused over. Requires expandingIcon to be true.

rotateGraphicWhenTraveling.label: Rotate graphic when traveling
rotateGraphicWhenTraveling.description: If true, the world object graphic rotates to face the direction of travel.

expandingIconColor.label: Expanding icon color
expandingIconColor.description: Tint color for the expanding icon. Written as '(R,G,B)' or '(R,G,B,A)' with 0-255 values. Source type is Color?; use IsNull="True" to represent null.

expandingIconDrawSize.label: Expanding icon draw size
expandingIconDrawSize.description: Scale multiplier for the expanding icon texture.

fullyExpandedInSpace.label: Fully expanded in space
fullyExpandedInSpace.description: If true, the expanding icon is always shown at full size when the world view is zoomed out to space.

shader.label: Shader
shader.description: ShaderTypeDef used to render the primary world object texture.

expandingShader.label: Expanding shader
expandingShader.description: ShaderTypeDef used to render the expanding icon texture.

drawAltitudeOffset.label: Draw altitude offset
drawAltitudeOffset.description: Vertical draw offset for the world object icon, used to layer overlapping icons.

blockExitGridUntilBattleIsWon.label: Block exit grid until battle is won
blockExitGridUntilBattleIsWon.description: If true, the map exit grid is blocked until all enemies are defeated.

nameMaker.label: Name maker
nameMaker.description: RulePackDef used to generate a procedural name for this world object.

basic-world-object.label: Basic world object
basic-world-object.description: Minimal world object with a label and runtime class.

player-home-world-object.label: Player home world object
player-home-world-object.description: World object that can serve as a player home base.
